selections.name: Air Of Defiance
selections.reason: Possesses elite early speed (111 Speed Rating) and draws well. Should clear early and control the pace, making him tough to catch.

selections.name: Get Her Number
selections.reason: Highly consistent runner with a 110 Speed Rating. Has the tactical speed to press the pace and pounce if the leader falters.

selections.name: Global Sensation
selections.reason: Classy veteran dropping in class. Has a strong closing kick that will play well over the long Churchill stretch.

selections.name: Gee No Hollander
selections.reason: Inside draw allows for a ground-saving trip. Can hit the board at a price with a clean break.

danger_horse.name: Highly Flammable
danger_horse.reason: Capable stalker who could benefit if a duel develops up front.

selections.name: Gentleman Jim
selections.reason: Projects to get a perfect stalking trip in a race devoid of true early speed. Upgraded due to pace scenario.

selections.name: Can't Stop Willis
selections.reason: Holds the highest raw speed figure (100) but his closing style is slightly compromised by the lack of pace. Still a major threat.

selections.name: Al Amjaad
selections.reason: Inside presser who gets a +4 pace void bonus. Should sit a prime trip right behind the leaders.

selections.name: Surfin' M
selections.reason: First start since being reported as a gelding. Could show improved focus and tactical speed.

danger_horse.name: Mor Cheese Please
danger_horse.reason: Has tactical speed and could inherit the lead by default in a paceless race.

selections.name: Street Painter
selections.reason: Boasts a 101 Speed and Class rating. Perfect pressing style for 7 furlongs and should get first run on the closers.

selections.name: Sunset Harbour
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 99 Speed Rating. Inside draw is a slight concern but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Argan
selections.reason: Has early speed and will be prominent from the bell. Dangerous if allowed to dictate terms.

selections.name: First Hill
selections.reason: Pace presence who will keep the leaders honest. Can hang on for a minor share.

danger_horse.name: My Bossy Lady
danger_horse.reason: Capable stalker who could pick up the pieces if the pace gets too hot.

selections.name: Lady Lux
selections.reason: Ran a strong 2nd on debut, earning a field-best 96 Speed Rating. Natural progression makes her the one to beat.

selections.name: Lucky Lollipop
selections.reason: Showed ability in debut with an 84 Speed Rating. Should improve second time out.

selections.name: I Know Nothing
selections.reason: Has race experience and an inside draw. Can move forward in this spot.

selections.name: Clever One
selections.reason: First-time starter for Mark Casse with Jose Ortiz aboard. Must be respected on connections alone.

danger_horse.name: Althesia
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter with solid works, could surprise at a price.

selections.name: Gypsy Art
selections.reason: Blazing early speed (114 Speed Rating) and perfectly drawn outside. Should clear and be very tough to catch on the turf sprint.

selections.name: Absolutely Hot
selections.reason: Highest raw speed figure in the field (118). Will be closing hard late if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Double Talker
selections.reason: Strong class rating (116) and tactical speed. Will get a great trip stalking the pace.

selections.name: Rose Ruler
selections.reason: Consistent turf sprinter with a 109 Speed Rating. Fits well in this competitive field.

danger_horse.name: Wearebackyoungman
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a late run and could hit the board at a massive price.

selections.name: Barker
selections.reason: Excellent stalking profile (107 Speed Rating). Drawn perfectly outside to monitor the pace duel and pounce.

selections.name: Island Town
selections.reason: Strong early speed from the rail. Will be sent hard and could take them all the way if left alone.

selections.name: City Of Life
selections.reason: Another early speed type who will ensure a fast pace. Dangerous if he shakes loose.

selections.name: Abrigado
selections.reason: Consistent presser who will benefit from the projected hot pace.

danger_horse.name: Great Moment
danger_horse.reason: Has back class and could wake up in this spot.

selections.name: Lovin' On The Run
selections.reason: Top speed figure (113) and gets a +4 bonus as an inside presser in a race lacking true early speed. Prime trip expected.

selections.name: Five A Side
selections.reason: Classy inside presser who also benefits from the pace void. Will save all the ground and be right there at the finish.

selections.name: Cat's Cave
selections.reason: Consistent stalker who fits the pace profile perfectly. Major exotic player.

selections.name: White Rocks
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (112). Cannot be ignored despite slightly lower recent speed figures.

danger_horse.name: Cervaro Della Sala (gb)
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a strong late run if the pace is faster than expected.

selections.name: Maiora
selections.reason: Pace meltdown scenario predicted with 3+ 'E' types. This closer gets a +5 bonus and has the highest raw speed (113) to capitalize.

selections.name: Eat Hay Run
selections.reason: One of the early speed types, but has the highest base rating among them. Could survive the duel.

selections.name: Hedge Book
selections.reason: Perfect stalking style for this chaotic pace scenario. Will get first run on the deep closers.

selections.name: Ez Connect
selections.reason: Talented early speed horse, but penalized -4 due to the projected duel. Still a threat if she clears easily.

danger_horse.name: Fregata
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw means she must go early, contributing to the hot pace, but she is very capable.
